system.description: The unwritten principle made manifest. Deal 26 + IRON + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target. Gain Regen 4 for 3 turns. Cleanse all debuffs from yourself. Apply Expose 4 and Bleed 3 to the target. All allies in the encounter gain Guard 8. Once per combat — this is the deepest expression of everything the code has made you.
